# Relay

> Relay is an open-source AI development platform for coding from any device. Archon IDE is Relay's live, browser-based, multi-model AI coding agent and web IDE.

Canonical website: https://relayapp.pro/
Live Archon IDE: https://app.relayapp.pro/
Relay source: https://github.com/Mattjhagen/Relay
Archon IDE source: https://github.com/Mattjhagen/archon-ide
Archon iOS source: https://github.com/Mattjhagen/archon-ios

## What Relay provides

- A product family for mobile and browser-based AI-assisted software development.
- Archon IDE, an open-source AI coding agent and web IDE.
- Multi-model AI choices across hosted and private or local providers.
- Durable projects, conversations, source files, and workspace continuity.
- Source editing, project search, terminals, Git status, diffs, and review workflows.
- User-controlled infrastructure and bring-your-own-provider options.

## Public resources

- Relay website: https://relayapp.pro/
- Archon IDE: https://app.relayapp.pro/
- Full AI-readable description: https://relayapp.pro/llms-full.txt
- Sitemap: https://relayapp.pro/sitemap.xml
- GitHub organization repositories: https://github.com/Mattjhagen

## Status

Relay and Archon are under active development. Public descriptions should distinguish shipped capabilities from roadmap items.
